description: Send messages to Slack channels and list workspace channels using a Bot Token.
credentialGuide:
1. Go to [api.slack.com/apps](https://api.slack.com/apps) and create a new app (or open an existing one) for your workspace.
2. Under **OAuth & Permissions**, add the bot scopes you need (e.g. `chat:write`, `channels:read`).
3. Install the app to your workspace, then copy the **Bot User OAuth Token** (starts with `xoxb-`).
4. Paste it into the Bot Token field below.
5. Invite the bot to any channel you want it to post in (`/invite @your-bot-name`).

configSchema.label: Bot Token
configSchema.helpText: Your Slack Bot User OAuth Token. Starts with 'xoxb-'. Found at api.slack.com/apps → your app → OAuth & Permissions → Bot User OAuth Token.

actions.description: Send a text message to a Slack channel

username.description: Override bot display name for this message

actions.description: List public channels in the Slack workspace

limit.description: Maximum number of channels to return (default 100, max 1000)
